user_story: As an HR admin, I want to enable or disable the knowledge transfer module using a Yes/No option, so that I can control whether the feature is available to the organization.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Setup screen; When I select Yes or No for "Do you want to enable the knowledge transfer module?"; Then my selection is captured for the module configuration

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save my knowledge transfer setup selection, so that the configuration is persisted.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen an option for enabling the knowledge transfer module; When I click Save; Then the configuration is saved and confirmed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to save and proceed to the next configuration step, so that I can complete setup efficiently in sequence.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have chosen an option on the Setup screen; When I click Save & Next; Then my selection is saved and I am advanced to the next configuration step

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to cancel my changes on the Setup screen, so that I can discard an unintended selection.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have made changes on the Setup screen; When I click Cancel; Then my unsaved changes are discarded
